How to Use Collect Customer Information

A 5 steps guide covering studio.youtube.com, tidycal.com, docs.google.com.

5 steps • Generated 2/18/2026

Table of Contents

1
Step-1
2

1
Step-1

First, go to this page, select and copy name after UOM onboarding call. example: Joe Rock

https://studio.youtube.com/channel/UCfnQWmGhJqOQ1CwnrjyM6Rg/videos/upload?filter=%5B%5D&sort=%7B%22columnType%22%3A%22date%22%2C%22sortOrder%22%3A%22DESCENDING%22%7D
2
Step-2

Then go to this page. Click Past. And search that name. You will find the name here.

https://tidycal.com/dashboard/bookings?s=John+Manzanet&show=past
3
Step-3

Then click the 3 dots. and select "View details"

https://tidycal.com/dashboard/bookings?s=John+Manzanet&show=past
4
Step-4

Collect the date, the name, the e-mail, the meeting URL, and mobile phone number from this page.

https://tidycal.com/dashboard/bookings?s=John+Manzanet&show=past
5
Step-5

Put all the info here in this sheet

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1c1B9vUT9MdfgCoXBJabCXKzCmQyiaCXxVQkIy7A4HD0/edit?gid=0#gid=0
